title: Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 is out for May 2026 PG semester examinations. Students can check Regular and Reappear exam schedules for MFDM, MBA C.I.T, M.Sc Home Science, M.Com, and other courses on the official website. Download the PDF timetable and verify semester-wise exam dates here.

content.text: Panjab University has officially released the Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 for multiple postgraduate semester examinations to be held in May 2026. The latest schedule includes Regular and Reappear exams for courses such as MFDM, M.B.A.C.I.T, M.Sc. Home Science, M.Sc. Applied Chemistry (Pharmaceutical), M.Com. (Business Innovations), M.Com. (Business Economics), and M.Com. (Entrepreneurship and Family Business).

Students can check the complete exam schedule on the official Panjab University website and download the PDF timetable through the direct links provided in the notice. To view the date sheet, candidates should open the official document and verify the exam date, time, semester, and course details carefully before preparing for the examination.
Download the Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 PDF here

links.text: Download the Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 PDF here

content.text: Students can download the official Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 PDF from the exam portal and save it for quick reference during preparation. The timetable includes the latest semester-wise schedule for May 2026 examinations.

The Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 provides the official exam schedule for postgraduate semester courses under the May 2026 session. It helps students track their exam dates, paper details, and semester pattern in one place.
Below is a quick overview of the released date sheet and the exam session covered in the latest notice.

sections.heading: Panjab University Date Sheet 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The Panjab University exam schedule for 2026 covers several PG programmes with semester-wise papers listed in the official notice. Students appearing in 2nd and 4th semester examinations should carefully check the subject-specific timetable for their course.
The following table lists the major courses mentioned in the released date sheet for May 2026. Candidates should match their paper and semester before downloading the PDF.

rows: Master in Fashion Designing and Management (MFDM)
Master in Business Administration Commerce & Information Technology (M.B.A.C.I.T)
M.Sc. Home Science (Food & Nutrition, Clothing & Textile & H.D.)

sections.heading: How to Download Panjab University Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the Panjab University date sheet directly from the official exam portal. The process is simple and takes only a few steps if you follow the notice carefully.

items: Visit the official Panjab University exam website.
Open the date sheet or examination notices section.
Locate the PDF link for your course and semester.
Click on the file to view the full timetable.
Download the PDF and save it on your device.
Print the date sheet if you need a hard copy for study planning.

content.text: Students should cross-check the timetable carefully and keep a copy ready for exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Panjab University Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official Panjab University date sheet includes all essential details students need before appearing for the May 2026 examinations. It is important to review each entry so there is no confusion on exam day.

items: University name and examination authority.
Course name and programme title.
Semester details such as 2nd or 4th semester.
Exam type, including Regular and Reappear.
Session and month of examination.
Subject-wise timetable and paper sequence.
Date and day of each examination.
Official PDF or notice link.
Instructions related to the examination schedule.
